title: Beef Burger with Caramelized Onions
description: A classic Australian-style beef burger topped with caramelized onions and melted cheese. Perfect for a casual dinner or weekend lunch.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan to medium-high heat.
Form 4 beef burger patties and season with salt and pepper.
Cook the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
While the patties are cooking, toast the bread roll in the oven at 350°F (180°C) for 2-3 minutes.
Caramelize the onions by cooking them in a pan with a small amount of oil over low heat for 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Assemble the burgers by spreading mayonnaise and ketchup on the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, a slice of cheese, a spoonful of caramelized onions, and finally the top bun.
